headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://telegram.org; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://telegram.org; media-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://telegram.org https://*.telegram.org; frame-src https://*.telegram.org; frame-ancestors https://web.telegram.org https://*.telegram.org; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'
